lane.title: 09 POS Write
lane.last_task: Phase 1 HE 200ml glass cold-drink SKU diagnostic
lane.last_summary: Ran read-only Phase 1 on HE production test.hamzahotel.com for Coke/Thums Up 200ml glass SKU request. Mutation gates blocked Phase 2: requested allowed_company_ids [2] is invalid/unauthorized on this Odoo; live companies are id 1 HN Hotels Pvt Ltd and id 10 Nawabi Chai House. Exact pos.category name ilike 'bain' returned zero rows; diagnostic category lookup found id 28 spelled 'Bane Marie'. No existing Coke/Thums/Thumps/Sprite/Glass 200ml product.template or product.product conflicts found. Active generic/orphan candidates found: Soft Drink id 1373 already unavailable/sale_off but still active, and active generic Cold drink - 250ml/500ml/1Litre ids 1392/1393/1394 in Bane Marie id 28; combo rows 1351-1354 match text but are ambiguous/protected, not archive candidates without owner confirmation. Existing HE-SOFT cold-drink SKUs 1398/1437/1438/1439/1440/1441 are in Extras id 76, not Bane Marie id 28. No mutation performed.
lane.next_action: Wait for Nihaf to confirm Phase 2 fills and resolve gates: use live company id 1 or provide correct company 2 access, confirm whether 'Bane Marie' id 28 is the intended Bain Marie label/category, retail price for Coke 200ml Glass, Sprite decision, and MRP-protection confirmation. Then rerun backup/write only after proceed.
lane.mutation_status: Read-only Odoo JSON-RPC diagnostics only; no product, category, POS config, pricelist, refund, session, repo, Cloudflare, WABA, ad, or customer mutation.
